Class ExperimentConfig

java.lang.Object
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.config.ExperimentConfig
public class ExperimentConfig extends Object
Unified v3 experiment configuration model.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    ExperimentConfig.DatabaseSection
    Relational database sink settings.
    static class 
    ExperimentConfig.GrammarSection
    Optional top-level grammar section injected into representation/problem params.
    static class 
    ExperimentConfig.LoggingSection
    Logging modes and verbosity settings.
    static class 
    ExperimentConfig.ObservabilitySection
    Observability toggles.
    static class 
    ExperimentConfig.PersistenceSection
    Persistence targets and DB settings.
    static class 
    ExperimentConfig.ReportingSection
    Report generation settings.
    static class 
    ExperimentConfig.RunSection
    Run identity and reproducibility section.
    static class 
    ExperimentConfig.StoppingSection
    Stopping policy config.
    static class 
    ExperimentConfig.TypedSection
    Generic typed plugin section with free-form params.
    static class 
    ExperimentConfig.WebSection
    Web dashboard settings.
